topics: Develop a model for the selected system from fundamental conservation principles
Develop a feedback control system using the concept of block diagram development and reduction
Implement the system model and controller in MATLAB or Simulink and simulate the response
Stability analysis: Analyse the stability of the system using methods like Routh-Hurwitz criterion, root locus method, Bode stability criterion, etc.
Select a suitable controller for the process
Optimize the control parameter for desired performance using Ziegler-Nichols tuning
Conduct experiment in the laboratory and evaluate the system performance with the experimental data
Report preparation and oral presentation: Prepare a detailed report and presentation before the evaluation committee
